mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

ACRONYM TABLE 
Acronym Description 
CO2 Carbon dioxide 
L4 Level 4 processing: Gap-filling 
RMSD Root mean square difference 
N/L, P/L, Si/L Nitrate, phosphate, silicate per litre 
Barents (Bar.) Barents Sea. The region definition is displayed in Figure 1b. 
NorwegianN (Nor. N.) Norwegian Sea – north. The region definition is displayed in Figure 1b. 
NorwegianS (Nor. S.) Norwegian Sea – south. The region definition is displayed in Figure 1b. 
IMR Institute of Marine Research, Norway 
WOA World Ocean Atlas 
 
 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
Nudging Nudging refers to an incremental adjustment for one product towards 
another product. In Section IV.1 satellite chlorophyll-a estimations were 
projected downward in the water column, by extrapolating surface 
concentrations using an empirical relation (Ardyna et al., 2013). The 
model chlorophyll-a profiles are then modified to achieve a closer value 
(30% of the difference) to the satellite estimated chlorophyll-a profiles.
